'''Sparky''' is [[Jaeru City]]'s gym leader in [[Pokémon Brown]]. Gives you the TM24 Thunderbolt upon defeat.

Once you get the Sparky Badge, you will be able to use Fly out of battle.

==Team==
===Pokémon Brown 20th Anniversary===
''Items: X Speed (at least 4)''
*Flaaffy Lv. 25 ♂
** Moves: Take Down, Thunder Wave
*Lanturn Lv. 27 ♂
** Moves: Signal Beam
*Electabuzz Lv. 27 ♂
** Moves: Quick Attack
*Jolteon Lv. 29 ♂
** Moves: Dig, Quick Attack

==Trivia==
*One of the NPCs of Jaeru City tried to defeat Sparky with a Ground-type Pokémon she captured in the Silk Tunnel, but was unsuccessful because it "wasn't good enough".
